subject: meeting readiness update for Hobart | Frida Kahlo | Q4 review | INIT-5837
body: Intelligence from Hobart indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the meeting banner. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Frida Kahlo and Nikola Tesla. Reference initiative INIT-5837. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: timeline, coordination.
